title: Modrinthium
description: A modpack that adds custom structures and biomes!
body:
# Modrinthium

**[Modrinthium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/modrinthium)** builds on the visual and performance enhancements of **[Super Good Looking](https://modrinth.com/modpack/super-good-looking)** (by me) while introducing a variety of world generation mods that redefine the way you explore. From reimagined landscapes to more intricate structures, **[Modrinthium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/modrinthium)** transforms Minecraft into a more vibrant, diverse world for adventurers and builders.

## Key Features:
- **Enhanced World Generation**: Explore new and breathtaking biomes with mods like **[Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/mod/tectonic)**, **[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)**, and **[Structory](https://modrinth.com/mod/structory)**, offering a richer, more detailed overworld.
- **The Nether and the End**: Discover an upgraded Nether with **[Nether 3.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/nether-3.0)**. In the End, experience the otherworldly landscapes of **[Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape)**, which completely overhauls the dimension.
- **Moog's Structures**: Encounter unique builds with **[Moog's Voyager Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures)**, **[Moog's Nether Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/mns-moogs-nether-structures)**, and **[Moog's End Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/mes-moogs-end-structures)**, adding depth and variety to your explorations.
- **YUNG's Mods**: Explore new bridges with **[YUNG's Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-bridges)**.
- **Visual Excellence**: Powered by the same visual mods as **[Super Good Looking](https://modrinth.com/modpack/super-good-looking)**, including **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)** and **[Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)**, **[Modrinthium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/modrinthium)** ensures the game looks stunning while maintaining excellent performance with **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**.
- **Immersive Sound and Animation**: Experience enhanced sounds and animations with **[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)** and **[Ambient Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)**, bringing your Minecraft world to life.
- **Entity and Lighting Improvements**: Enjoy refined rendering of entities through **[Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**, along with dynamic lighting from **[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)**.
- **Optimized Performance**: **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** and **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**, alongside **[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)** and **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)**, ensure smooth gameplay, even in the most complex environments.

---

[IterationT](https://www.minebbs.com/resources/iterationt.8578/) was created by Tahnass.
